name: Boswell Park
description: Boswell Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lebanon, MO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Lebanon Family YMCA
description: Lebanon Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Lebanon, MO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Watch for court closures for rentals.
fees: Fee required — $5 day pass to play or $20 monthly unlimited pass, does not include access to the rest of the facility ammenities. Pickleball is free with a YMCA membership.

name: Wallace Park
description: Wallace Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lebanon, MO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.
